title: ascalea lanceolata
intro: Ascalea lanceolata, also known as Sweet Goldenrod, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The health benefits of Ascalea lanceolata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sweet Goldenrod can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor infections.
